auth.login_subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the marketplace.
auth.error_credentials: Please enter your email/username and password.
auth.error_verify_email: Please verify your email before logging in. Check your inbox and spam folder.
auth.error_profile_init: Could not initialize your account profile.
auth.resend_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.resend_hint: Didn't get the email? Check spam, then resend to {email}.
auth.register_subtitle: Join your campus marketplace with a verified university email.
auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter your university email and we'll send a reset link.
auth.check_email_subtitle: We sent a verification link to {email}.
auth.check_email_spam: Can't find it? Check your spam or junk folder.
orders.hub_subtitle: Track purchases, sales, meetups, and reviews in one place.
orders.how_it_works_title: How orders and chat deals work
orders.how_it_works_body: Messaging a seller can create a pending order here with meetup details. When you finish the sale in chat, both of you confirm the deal — the seller's confirmation marks the item sold and completes the linked order.
orders.empty_purchases: You haven't placed any orders yet.
orders.empty_sales: You don't have any sales yet.
orders.admin_redirect: Administrators do not have personal orders. Use the Admin Panel to view all orders.
orders.flash_confirmed: Order confirmed and product marked as sold.
place_order.title: Complete Your Order
place_order.error_duplicate: You already have a pending order for this item.
place_order.success: Order placed! The seller has been notified.
chat.orders_deal_explainer: After you meet up, confirm the deal in this chat. My Orders tracks meetup details; chat confirmation marks the item sold.
admin.unauthorized: You do not have permission to access that page.
chat.translate_failed: Could not translate this message. Try again.
chat.translation_unavailable: Translation is not available right now.
report.title: Report an Issue
report.subtitle: Help us keep CampusMarket safe by reporting suspicious listings, abusive users, or technical problems.
report.description_placeholder: Please provide details about the issue...
report.success: Thank you for your report. Our moderation team has been notified and will review it shortly.
report.error_submit: There was an error submitting your report. Please try again later.
report.error_description_required: Please describe the issue before submitting.
report.error_rate_limit: You have submitted too many reports. Please try again in about {minutes} minutes.
report.error_duplicate: You already have a pending report for this item. Our team is reviewing it.
auth.error_suspended: Your account has been suspended. Contact support if you believe this is a mistake.
admin.flash_report_resolved: Report marked as resolved and reporter notified.
admin.flash_report_flagged: Listing flagged, hidden from marketplace, and parties notified.
admin.flash_report_warned: Warning sent to the user and reporter notified.
admin.report_invalid_action: That moderation action is not available for this report.
admin.report_cannot_target_self: You cannot moderate your own account.
admin.report_suspend_failed: Could not suspend that user (they may be an admin).
admin.report_confirm_flag: Flag this listing and hide it from the marketplace?
admin.report_confirm_suspend: Suspend this user? They will be logged out and unable to sign in.
admin.report_reporter_dismissed_body: We reviewed your report and did not take action at this time.
admin.report_reporter_resolved_body: Thank you for your report. Our team has reviewed it and taken appropriate action.
admin.report_reporter_flagged_body: Thank you for reporting this listing. We removed it from the marketplace.
admin.report_reporter_warned_body: Thank you for your report. We issued a warning to the reported user.
admin.report_reporter_suspended_body: Thank you for your report. We suspended the reported account.
admin.report_seller_flagged_body: Your listing "{title}" was flagged and hidden after a community report.
admin.report_warn_user_body: An administrator reviewed a report about your account. Please follow campus marketplace guidelines.
admin.report_suspend_user_body: Your account was suspended after a moderation review. Contact support to appeal.
admin.report_unsuspend_body: Your account suspension has been lifted. You can use CampusMarket again.
